channel.title: bbcnews TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

item.title: The BBC understands that Gemma Collins chose to collaborate with the Department for Education in order to highlight alternative options for young people who feel university is not for them. #GemmaCollins #Education #UK #TOWIE #UKNews #BBCNews
item.description: The BBC understands that Gemma Collins chose to collaborate with the Department for Education in order to highlight alternative options for young people who feel university is not for them. #GemmaCollins #Education #UK #TOWIE #UKNews #BBCNews

item.title: Ticket prices for family attractions like theme parks, zoos and museums will also be cheaper during the summer holidays, through a cut to VAT, the chancellor has said. #Buses #Travel #Politics #Government #BBCNews
item.description: Ticket prices for family attractions like theme parks, zoos and museums will also be cheaper during the summer holidays, through a cut to VAT, the chancellor has said. #Buses #Travel #Politics #Government #BBCNews

item.title: The diseases can be avoided by the proper use of condoms. #Gonorrhoea #Syphilis #Health #BBCNews
item.description: The diseases can be avoided by the proper use of condoms. #Gonorrhoea #Syphilis #Health #BBCNews

item.title: A Tennessee man who was jailed for more than month following his arrest over a Facebook post related to the killing of Charlie Kirk has settled a "unlawful incarceration" lawsuit for $835,000 (£621,000). #CharlieKirk #Tennessee #Facebook #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: A Tennessee man who was jailed for more than month following his arrest over a Facebook post related to the killing of Charlie Kirk has settled a "unlawful incarceration" lawsuit for $835,000 (£621,000). #CharlieKirk #Tennessee #Facebook #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: The education secretary argued Gemma Collins had a reach "politicians can't reach". #GemmaCollins #GCSE #TOWIE #Education #News #BBCNews
item.description: The education secretary argued Gemma Collins had a reach "politicians can't reach". #GemmaCollins #GCSE #TOWIE #Education #News #BBCNews

item.title: At least one in 10 women live with adenomyosis, a womb condition that can cause heavy, painful and irregular periods. #WomensHealth #HealthTok #BBCNews
item.description: At least one in 10 women live with adenomyosis, a womb condition that can cause heavy, painful and irregular periods. #WomensHealth #HealthTok #BBCNews

item.title: The UK government says shoppers could save at least £150 million on their yearly food bills with new cost of living measures - but will this make a difference to individual shoppers? #CostOfLiving #Shop #Finance #UK #BBCNews
item.description: The UK government says shoppers could save at least £150 million on their yearly food bills with new cost of living measures - but will this make a difference to individual shoppers? #CostOfLiving #Shop #Finance #UK #BBCNews

item.title: Fans lined up in New York City one last time for “The Late Show” as Stephen Colbert prepared to host his final episode, marking the end of the franchise’s 33-year run on CBS. #StephenColbert #Colbert #CBS #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: Fans lined up in New York City one last time for “The Late Show” as Stephen Colbert prepared to host his final episode, marking the end of the franchise’s 33-year run on CBS. #StephenColbert #Colbert #CBS #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: The Fifa World Cup was supposed to provide a tourism boom for the US, but now the fear is it may never materialise. #FIFAWorldCup #Fifa #Hotels #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: The Fifa World Cup was supposed to provide a tourism boom for the US, but now the fear is it may never materialise. #FIFAWorldCup #Fifa #Hotels #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: Would you put your phone in a lockbox at the cinema? #Cinema #Movie #Film #Gwynedd #BBCNews
item.description: Would you put your phone in a lockbox at the cinema? #Cinema #Movie #Film #Gwynedd #BBCNews

item.title: The parents of some girls who survived the 2024 Southport attack say their children are being forgotten and given insufficient support. #Southport #SouthportAttack #UK #UKNews #BBCNews
item.description: The parents of some girls who survived the 2024 Southport attack say their children are being forgotten and given insufficient support. #Southport #SouthportAttack #UK #UKNews #BBCNews

item.title: Temperatures are forecast to rise as high as 30C in parts of the UK as a potential heatwave develops across the long bank holiday weekend. #Heatwave #UK #Weather #BankHoliday #BBCNews
item.description: Temperatures are forecast to rise as high as 30C in parts of the UK as a potential heatwave develops across the long bank holiday weekend. #Heatwave #UK #Weather #BankHoliday #BBCNews

item.title: Government ministers have pressed supermarkets on cutting costs for UK shoppers. #Supermarkets #CostOfLiving #Economy #Money #BBCNews
item.description: Government ministers have pressed supermarkets on cutting costs for UK shoppers. #Supermarkets #CostOfLiving #Economy #Money #BBCNews

item.title: Amazon UK's boss called for work experience to be mandatory for over 16s - do you agree? NEET #Jobs #Amazon #Apprenticeship #Unemployment #BBCNews
item.description: Amazon UK's boss called for work experience to be mandatory for over 16s - do you agree? NEET #Jobs #Amazon #Apprenticeship #Unemployment #BBCNews

item.title: Manchester City have confirmed that manager Pep Guardiola will leave the club after Sunday's final match of the season. #PepGuardiola #ManchesterCity #Football #BreakingNews #BBCNews
item.description: Manchester City have confirmed that manager Pep Guardiola will leave the club after Sunday's final match of the season. #PepGuardiola #ManchesterCity #Football #BreakingNews #BBCNews

item.title: US President Donald Trump’s son, Don Jr, is due to get married to Bettina Anderson this weekend. #DonaldTrump #DonaldTrumpJr #BettinaAnderson #US #BBCNews
item.description: US President Donald Trump’s son, Don Jr, is due to get married to Bettina Anderson this weekend. #DonaldTrump #DonaldTrumpJr #BettinaAnderson #US #BBCNews

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX has revealed plans to go public in the US, allowing people to trade shares in the firm on the stock market. #ElonMusk #SpaceX #Trillionaire #Rich #BBCNews
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX has revealed plans to go public in the US, allowing people to trade shares in the firm on the stock market. #ElonMusk #SpaceX #Trillionaire #Rich #BBCNews

item.title: The disgraced tycoon is serving a life sentence for embezzling from a major Vietnamese bank and has been ordered to return $27bn in reparations. #Birkin #Vietnam #TruongMyLan #Embezzlement # Crime #BBCNews
item.description: The disgraced tycoon is serving a life sentence for embezzling from a major Vietnamese bank and has been ordered to return $27bn in reparations. #Birkin #Vietnam #TruongMyLan #Embezzlement # Crime #BBCNews

item.title: BBC Radio 1's Big Weekend has officially started in Herrington Country Park, Sunderland, with thousands of fans already in and dancing. #BigWeekend #Radio1BigWeekend #Sunderland #MusicTok #BBCNews
item.description: BBC Radio 1's Big Weekend has officially started in Herrington Country Park, Sunderland, with thousands of fans already in and dancing. #BigWeekend #Radio1BigWeekend #Sunderland #MusicTok #BBCNews

item.title: No Title
item.description: No Description

item.title: It is possible to prevent skin cancer by being careful in the sun, by using sunscreen with at least SPF 30 and four or five stars, and seeking shade. #Melanoma #SkinCancer #CancerResearch #BBCNews
item.description: It is possible to prevent skin cancer by being careful in the sun, by using sunscreen with at least SPF 30 and four or five stars, and seeking shade. #Melanoma #SkinCancer #CancerResearch #BBCNews

item.title: Thomas Tuchel has named his 26-man squad. Thoughts? #England #WorldCup2026 #WorldCup #FootballTok #BBCNews
item.description: Thomas Tuchel has named his 26-man squad. Thoughts? #England #WorldCup2026 #WorldCup #FootballTok #BBCNews

item.title: Yves Sakila died last after an incident on Dublin's Henry Street. He had been detained by a number of security guards over an alleged shoplifting incident. The Congolese man died not long afterwards in hospital. #Dublin #Protests #News #BBCNews
item.description: Yves Sakila died last after an incident on Dublin's Henry Street. He had been detained by a number of security guards over an alleged shoplifting incident. The Congolese man died not long afterwards in hospital. #Dublin #Protests #News #BBCNews

item.title: Tulsi Gabbard has said she is resigning from her position as the US director of national intelligence in the Trump administration, citing her husband's recent bone cancer diagnosis. #TulsiGabbard #US #Politics #BreakingNews #BBCNews
item.description: Tulsi Gabbard has said she is resigning from her position as the US director of national intelligence in the Trump administration, citing her husband's recent bone cancer diagnosis. #TulsiGabbard #US #Politics #BreakingNews #BBCNews

item.title: Clementine Douglas is performing at BBC Radio 1's Big Weekend opening day in Sunderland, where the festival will be using all of its stages to host a "huge dance party". #ClementineDouglas #BBCR1BigWeekend #BigWeekend #Sunderland #BBCRadio1 #BBCNews
item.description: Clementine Douglas is performing at BBC Radio 1's Big Weekend opening day in Sunderland, where the festival will be using all of its stages to host a "huge dance party". #ClementineDouglas #BBCR1BigWeekend #BigWeekend #Sunderland #BBCRadio1 #BBCNews

item.title: 'Extraordinary' heat health alerts have been issued ahead of the bank holiday weekend as temperatures are forecast to rise to record-breaking levels. ☀️ #Weather #England #Wales #Scotland #NorthernIreland #BBCNews
item.description: 'Extraordinary' heat health alerts have been issued ahead of the bank holiday weekend as temperatures are forecast to rise to record-breaking levels. ☀️ #Weather #England #Wales #Scotland #NorthernIreland #BBCNews

item.title: Catriona Graham was one of hundreds of activists who were detained by Israel this week while trying to deliver aid to Palestinians in Gaza by boat. #Gaza #Israel #Flotilla #BBCNews
item.description: Catriona Graham was one of hundreds of activists who were detained by Israel this week while trying to deliver aid to Palestinians in Gaza by boat. #Gaza #Israel #Flotilla #BBCNews

item.title: The pop star is facing one misdemeanour count of driving under the influence of any alcohol and drugs, after she was arrested on 4 March. #BritneySpears #California #Police #DashCam #US #BBCNews
item.description: The pop star is facing one misdemeanour count of driving under the influence of any alcohol and drugs, after she was arrested on 4 March. #BritneySpears #California #Police #DashCam #US #BBCNews

item.title: Recent government filings show that in the first three months of this year thousands of stock market trades were made on behalf of President Donald Trump. #DonaldTrump #StockMarket #WallStreet #USNews #BBCNews
item.description: Recent government filings show that in the first three months of this year thousands of stock market trades were made on behalf of President Donald Trump. #DonaldTrump #StockMarket #WallStreet #USNews #BBCNews

item.title: The UK government is to review the sentencing of three teenage boys who raped two girls in separate attacks in Hampshire, UK, after criticism their sentences were too lenient. Before the appeal, Jess Phillips, who served as minister for safeguarding and v
item.description: The UK government is to review the sentencing of three teenage boys who raped two girls in separate attacks in Hampshire, UK, after criticism their sentences were too lenient. Before the appeal, Jess Phillips, who served as minister for safeguarding and v
